title: EV/EBITDA: A firm has an EBITDA of 10 million and a...
summary: Calculate enterprise value by applying the industry EV/EBITDA multiple to the firm's EBITDA.
prompt: A firm has an EBITDA of $10 million and a market value of debt of $5 million. If the industry average EV/EBITDA multiple is 6, what is the enterprise value?
solution: Enterprise Value = EV/EBITDA * EBITDA = 6 * $10 million = $60 million.
